steps.t: The time has come to travel high into the Welkin-lofts seeking Ausma's apprentices. You should head south with Hórin and travel along the Father's Pat…
Molkha should be somewhere near the frozen lake south-west of Fellgát. You should find Molkha with Hórin.
You have found Molkha on the frozen lake south-west of Fellgát. You should talk to Molkha to receive her report.
Molkha should be somewhere near the frozen lake, south-west of Fellgát. You should talk to Molkha.
Now that you have Molkha's report, it is time to move further up the mountain. You should talk to Hórin and decide how to proceed.
